info.title: Teedy API
info.description: REST API for Teedy (sismics/docs). All endpoints are under `/api`. Authenticate with a session cookie (obtained via `POST /user/login`) or an API key sent as `Authorization: Bearer tdapi_<hex>`. Mutations use `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` bodies unless noted (file upload uses `multipart/form-data`).

servers.description: Live API, resolved relative to this spec at /apidoc/openapi.json so it works under any context path.

post.summary: Clean the file and DB storage

put.summary: Import a new document from an EML file

post.summary: Attach an orphan file to a document

get.summary: Returns all files from a document, zipped.

post.summary: Returns a list of files, zipped

put.summary: Add a user to a group

delete.summary: Remove a user from a group

post.summary: Start a route on a document
Validate the current step of a route

get.summary: Get the routes on a document

post.summary: Disable TOTP authentication for a specific user
Mark the current user as onboarded
Disable TOTP authentication for the current user
Create a key to reset a password and send it by email

get.summary: Count documents referencing a vocabulary entry
